final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing museum-style infographic for a Chinese ethnic minority costume, suitable for a national museum exhibit panel.

Style/medium: needs a national museum exhibit panel aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be infographic layout with fixed five-zone structure: top title area, left structural breakdown zone with leader lines and close-ups, upper-right material/texture zone with real texture swatches, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color swatches and cultural explanations, bottom wearing-order flowchart and core feature summary; central subject must be either a full-body standing figure or central object breakdown depending on the chosen costume
Subject: must include one selected Chinese ethnic minority costume with complete structural components (headwear, upper garment, lower garment, accessories, footwear as applicable)
Scene/backdrop: must be paper-textured background in rice white / silk paper white / light tea tones
Lighting/mood: needs a scholarly, restrained, professional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an earth-toned, historically grounded direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic fabric surface treatments showing real textile differences — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Simplified Chinese text: main title, subtitle, introduction, component labels with leader lines, material descriptions, pattern symbolism explanations, color meaning annotations, wearing sequence steps, and core feature summary
Constraints: must preserve the five-zone layout structure, must use only Simplified Chinese (no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters), must emphasize authentic structure, material differences, cultural annotations, and encyclopedic museum quality
Avoid: must avoid poster aesthetics, studio photography aesthetics, e-commerce aesthetics, anime aesthetics, cosplay aesthetics, incorrect labeling, wrong structural diagrams, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
